title: B.Ed Jobs 2026 – Assistant Lecturer
shortInfo: District School Education Office East Garo Hills (DSEO East Garo Hills) Assistant Lecturer Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 5 vacancies. Candidates with Master Degree in respective subject with B.Ed qualification can apply offline for these Assistant Lecturer posts before 05 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: DSEO East Garo Hills Assistant Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District School Education Office East Garo Hills
basic_details.short_information: District School Education Office East Garo Hills (DSEO East Garo Hills) Assistant Lecturer Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 5 vacancies. Candidates with Master Degree in respective subject with B.Ed qualification can apply offline for these Assistant Lecturer posts before 05 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the DSEO East Garo Hills Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in respective subject with B.Ed
qualification.details: Assistant Lecturer in Garo (MLL) (Day Shift): Master Degree in Garo with B.Ed Assistant Lecturer in English (Evening Shift): Master Degree in English with B.Ed Assistant Lecturer in English (Morning Shift): Master Degree in English with B.Ed Assistant Lecturer in Economics (Morning Shift): Master Degree in Economics with B.Ed Assistant Lecturer in History (Morning Shift): Master Degree in History with B.Ed

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Assistant Lecturer posts is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Lecturer positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in the respective subject along with a Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) degree to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 32 years as of 01 January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the Assistant Lecturer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Assistant Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: A total of 5 vacancies are available for the Assistant Lecturer positions across various subjects and shifts.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Assistant Lecturer role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant Lecturer positions is Rs. 40,000/- and Rs. 15,000/-. Specific details might be available in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the designated address.

faq.question: Which subjects have vacancies for Assistant Lecturer?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available for Assistant Lecturer in Garo, English, Economics, and History.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Assistant Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
